about_item: 【Portable & Foldable Bowls】Our Kytely collapsible dog bowls only 0.7 inch when folded, simply Pop-Up and then fold away, which are perfect for traveling, hiking, camping and outdoor
【Easy to Clean】Easy to clean with wet cloth or just place in the dishwasher machine or run through water. Clean up could not be any easier

【350ML Capacity Each Dog Bowl】Size of this dog travel bowl is 5 inch wide, 2.1inch height. Each bowl can hold up to 12oz of water or 1.5cup of dog food, suitable for small to medium dogs, cats or other pets
【Premium Quality】Made of great flexible materials, BPA free, Lead-free, odorless, durable and friendly. Very Safe for your lovely pet to use

【Our Warranty】Friendly customer services and we are extremely confident of Kytely collapsible dog bowls quality. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, just drop us an email and we will refund or send a new set

summary.text: Customers find these collapsible pet bowls great for on-the-go use, with one mentioning they can be tucked away at the office. The bowls are durable, lasting several months, and customers appreciate their convenient size for car storage. They are made of one solid piece, and customers consider them good value for money.

authors_reviews.title: Great value and quality
authors_reviews.text: Great price for two of them. Daily use on our longer walks and hikes. Clean up easily!
authors_reviews.author: Scott Van Ells

authors_reviews.title: Just what we needed
authors_reviews.text: Let's begin with my dog is 14+ yo. These bowls are a bit softer than the typical ceramic feeding bowl and seem kinder to my dog's mouth/front teeth. If we put one of these next to her old feeding bowl with the same food, she chooses this bowl every time. They are also the perfect size to fit in our elevated feeding stand (she's a sheltie so on the smaller side). We keep one in the car for post-walk water- easy to store. I love the ability to collapse and expand them anywhere from a plate to a full bowl. At this price point, totally worth it.
authors_reviews.author: OlivesMom

authors_reviews.title: Great for traveling
authors_reviews.text: Great for traveling. Easy to use and clean. Pack flat
authors_reviews.author: John T

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: Sent them to my brothers dog in San Antonio and it's making their long walks in the heat much better!
authors_reviews.author: Kathleen Chapman

authors_reviews.title: Works well for my service dog for water
authors_reviews.text: I use these dishes for my guide dog on trips especially at hotels where I could fill it up and leave it out for her. She does better with larger water dishes because smaller dishes she feels obligated to drink the entire bowl in one sitting where this she drinks the amount she needs. It is durable and sturdy which is uncommon for larger dog bowls which in my experience sacrifice durability for size. It definitely takes up more room though so I probably won’t bring it back woods camping with us but I bought it for the hotel and it met my purpose for that. Overall I highly recommend. For reference my guide dog is a 60 pound black lab and she would usually need it refilled in the morning and again at 3 in the afternoon so it is enough water in it to last her most the day. When I refilled it it was not empty either so it could probably hold enough water for the entire day if the dog completely drains it.
authors_reviews.author: Jake

authors_reviews.title: Good for traveling
authors_reviews.text: These bowls are good for traveling. A little wonky. My dog pushes it down and it folds while she’s eating sometimes. We may also just need to size up.
authors_reviews.author: Lyss

authors_reviews.title: Great for taking on walks
authors_reviews.text: Just what I wanted. I take a friend's dog for walks, and this collapsible bowl with a carabiner clip let's me easily take along a bowl to give her some water when she's getting thirsty.
authors_reviews.author: Steve
